neighbors.name: Jason Leigh & Meshell Denise Shepherd
neighbors.claims: Jason and Meshell Shepherd own property in Cochise County (APN 106-06-025D) ([Compass](https://www.compass.com/homedetails/334-W-Oak-St-Huachuca-City-AZ-85616/ZSRSN_pid/)). No public records of civic engagement, board memberships, or comments on local development were found for this couple ([Cochise County](https://www.cochise.az.gov/106/Clerk-of-the-Board)).
neighbors.influence_justification: No public profile or civic roles found

approach_recommendations.engage: Approach via polite, personal outreach to introduce the project. Invite questions and reassure them regarding property respect and privacy.

neighbors.name: Melanie A. Fiorucci
neighbors.claims: Melanie A. Fiorucci is a real estate professional active in the Phoenix metro area, including Scottsdale and Chandler ([Redfin](https://www.redfin.com/AZ/Scottsdale/30104-N-166th-Way-85262/home/53473654)). She is listed as a property owner in Cochise County but appears to be an absentee owner or investor given her primary business activities in Maricopa County ([Cochise County](https://www.cochise.az.gov/106/Clerk-of-the-Board)).
neighbors.influence_justification: Real estate professional; likely absentee owner

approach_recommendations.engage: Contact via professional channels. Acknowledge her real estate background; emphasize property value protection and transparency regarding the project's impact.

neighbors.name: Peggy A. Stoll
neighbors.claims: Peggy A. Stoll is a resident of the Sierra Vista area ([AZCC](https://ecorp.azcc.gov/CommonHelper/GetFilingDocuments?barcode=00412294)). She appears to be a retired academic, formerly teaching English at Iowa State University before retiring to Arizona ([ISU Alumni](https://www.isualum.org/s/565/images/editor_documents/2023/retirees/obituaries_2023__1_.pdf)).
neighbors.influence_justification: Retired academic; no known local leadership

approach_recommendations.engage: Reach out with a neighborly introduction. Provide clear project information to address potential concerns of a retiree regarding privacy and quiet enjoyment.
